# About
### About
  * [Overview](https://www.aeluma.com/about)
  * [Management Team](https://www.aeluma.com/about/management-team)
  * [Board of Directors](https://www.aeluma.com/about/board-of-directors)
  * [Certification & Compliance](https://www.aeluma.com/about/certification-compliance)


## High-Performance Semiconductors that Scale
Enabling high-performance semiconductors in mass markets
Aeluma is a transformative semiconductor company specializing in scalable, cost-effective technologies for numerous applications across mobile, AI, defense & aerospace, robotics, automotive, AR/VR, and quantum.
## Disruptive Semiconductors and Large-Scale Manufacturing
Aeluma's semiconductor platform enables high-performance photonics and electronics for a variety of critical applications. Our manufacturing approach leverages large-diameter substrates and advanced packaging techniques to bridge compound semiconductor materials and large-scale integration. 
[ Explore Our Technology ](https://www.aeluma.com/technology)
![](https://d1io3yog0oux5.cloudfront.net/_20cacd49d68ad2c653c1e05313a006c3/aeluma/db/2466/21196/image.jpg)
### Innovative Sensors for Vision and Communications
Aeluma's sensor technologies apply to defense & aerospace, mobile, industrial automation, robotics, and automotive. Our competitive advantages include higher scalability, higher sensitivity, higher speed, and lower cost.
![](https://d1io3yog0oux5.cloudfront.net/_20cacd49d68ad2c653c1e05313a006c3/aeluma/db/2466/21197/image.jpg)
### Next-Generation Applications and Emerging Markets
In addition to sensors for vision and communications, our technology can service markets across AI infrastructure including data center interconnects, consumer electronics, AR/VR, and quantum.
![](https://d1io3yog0oux5.cloudfront.net/_20cacd49d68ad2c653c1e05313a006c3/aeluma/db/2462/21199/image.jpg)
## Leading the Way in Scalable Manufacturing
Founded in 2019, Aeluma seeks to leverage its proprietary technology to enable cost-effective scaling of high-performance semiconductors across a breadth of markets. Aeluma’s technology breakthrough combines compound semiconductors with large-diameter substrate manufacturing. The company is a proud advocate of American leadership in semiconductors and has established a state-of-the-art manufacturing capability combining in-house materials production, test and validation, with external fabrication, packaging and integration partners.
## Guided by Experienced and Knowledgeable Leadership
Aeluma's leadership team comprises of industry veterans and scientific experts with experiences from leading organizations in the semiconductor, automotive, microelectronics, telecommunication, wireless, biomedical and sensing industries.
[View Management Team](https://www.aeluma.com/investors/company-information/management-team) [View Board of Directors](https://www.aeluma.com/investors/corporate-governance/board-of-directors)
